posts.summary: If You're Sitting on the Fence About Servicing Your Hot Water System Read This! Inside most hot water systems is a sacrificial anode designed to protect the tank from corrosion. Once that anode breaks down, minerals and water attack the cylinder from the inside out. Regular servicing helps extend the lifespan, improve water quality, reduce unexpected breakdowns.

We recently replaced an older instantaneous gas hot water system with a brand new Envirosun instantaneous gas system for a customer whose existing unit had reached the end of its life. A lot of older gas systems start becoming unreliable with age, leading to inconsistent hot water, ignition issues, temperature fluctuations.

Hot Water Upgrade of a Saxon system that Finally Called It a Day. Out with the Old, In with the Reliable! We recently replaced an old Saxon hot water system. Installed a brand new system, upgraded the pipework, and made sure everything is running properly for the colder months ahead.

Hot Water and the Cooler Months. As the weather starts to cool down, your hot water system has to work a lot harder. A lot of people are now choosing to upgrade to heat pump systems. They use up to around 70% less energy than a standard electric system, which can make a real difference to your power bills.

Tree Roots in Pipes. Small Problem That Gets Big Fast. Tree roots are one of the most common causes of blocked drains and septic issues. This photo shows a septic tank completely inundated with tree roots. Common signs include slow drains, recurring blockages, gurgling sounds, sewage backing up.

Choosing the right hot water system can make a big difference to your running costs, efficiency, and overall performance. We install electric storage, gas storage, instantaneous tankless, heat pump, and solar hot water systems to suit different homes and budgets.

Got a blocked drain? Whether it's a slow drain, gurgling pipes or a full blockage causing water to back up. At Projection Plumbing, we clear blocked drains across Brisbane. From kitchen sinks and showers through to main sewer lines and stormwater drains. Tree roots, grease build-up, debris or damaged pipes.

Got water sitting in your yard after rain and not draining away? It's usually a sign something's not right with your stormwater drainage. Most of the time it comes down to blocked or damaged stormwater pipes. Things like dirt, leaves, tree roots or even poor setup can stop water from flowing away properly.

Got a water leak coming from your shower, floor or walls? At Projection Plumbing, we specialise in leak detection and water leak repairs across Brisbane. Whether it's a visible leak or something hidden behind walls or under floors, we can locate the source quickly. Common signs include damp patches, mould, musty smells.

Need a reliable plumber in North Brisbane? Projection Plumbing is here for all your plumbing and gas fitting needs across Kedron, Nundah, Chermside, Stafford, Aspley. From emergency blocked drains and hot water repairs to gas fitting installations and bathroom renovations.

With the chill in the air and the colder months coming in, your hot water system starts working harder. At Projection Plumbing, we handle everything hot water across Brisbane. From servicing existing systems to full replacements. We work with electric, gas, solar and heat pump hot water systems.

Under Sink Water Filter Installation Brisbane for Clean Safe Drinking Water. Projection Plumbing installs under sink water filtration systems across Brisbane to improve the quality of your drinking water. These systems help remove impurities such as rust, sediment, dirt, and other contaminants.

We recently completed a septic and grey water trench replacement in Cashmere, where the existing system had reached the end of its service life and was no longer draining effectively. Our team excavated and installed new absorption trenches to restore proper flow.

Gas systems play an important role in many Brisbane homes, from cooking appliances to gas hot water systems. Our licensed gas fitters provide gas appliance installations, gas hot water system installations, gas line repairs, and gas leak inspections.

Your Trusted Local Plumbers in Brisbane. Our team of experienced plumbers works across Brisbane helping homeowners and businesses with blocked drains, hot water systems, leak detection, gas fitting, water filtration, stormwater drainage, and general plumbing maintenance.

What's actually in your drinking water? This photo shows the filters we removed today from a dual-stage whole house water filtration system in Gumdale. The old filters have collected a large amount of sediment, rust, and contaminants. Regular servicing and cartridge replacement is so important.

Quarterly and Annual Plumbing Checks for Body Corporate and Strata across North Brisbane. Our preventative maintenance checks include stormwater and sewer inspections, drain checks, hot water system condition reports, pressure testing and leak detection, valve TMV and backflow checks.

This is what was hiding inside a stormwater line. Tree roots completely invading a stormwater pipe. Over time, tree roots work their way into small cracks or joints in underground pipework. Once inside, they grow rapidly, trapping debris and restricting water flow during heavy rain.

Stormwater not draining properly? Tree roots had completely taken over the stormwater pit, growing through the pipework and restricting flow. This is a common issue across North Brisbane, especially in older properties with established trees nearby.

Finding the problem without digging up your whole yard. Using our CCTV drain camera and underground locator, we can accurately trace and pinpoint the exact location and depth of your sewer or stormwater line. Whether it's tree roots, a crack, a collapse, or a blockage. Smart diagnostics equals smarter repairs.

Wet weather plus tree roots equals blocked drains. With all the recent rain around Brisbane, we're seeing a spike in blocked drains and tree roots are the main culprit. Here's a job we attended in Nundah where the drain was completely blocked by tree roots.

Ever wondered why one fixture in your home works perfectly but another like a toilet keeps blocking? The toilet line had a crack in the pipework. Tree roots found their way in, searching for moisture, and slowly grew until they blocked that specific line.

Clearing a blocked drain is only half the job. By inspecting the drain with a CCTV camera, we can see exactly what's causing the blockage, confirm whether the drain is fully clear, identify the best way to attack the problem properly, and provide clear options for a long-term fix.

This is what flushable wipes really look like when they come out of a drain. We removed truckloads of baby wipes from the sewer system at a facility in Nundah Brisbane. Despite what the packaging says, baby wipes do not break down like toilet paper. Blocked drain specialists servicing Nundah and greater Brisbane.

No hot water turns a normal day into a bad one very quickly. At Projection Plumbing, we supply, install and repair hot water systems across North Brisbane, including gas, electric, heat pump and energy-efficient options. We help you choose the right one for your home, usage and long-term running costs.
